note: The skill parallel to universal_roles. Just as roles are universal needs met by local method, SKILLS serve universal FUNCTIONS — heal, shield, strike, reveal, conceal, bind, move, break, mend, ward — and each tradition achieves the function its own way. MORE CRITICALLY: the real depth is CROSS-DOMAIN COMBINATION — two functions from two domains combined produce something neither could alone. A shield woven of Radiance AND Stillcraft is not either; a strike of the Edge carried on Umbracraft's unseen is a third thing. Combination is where mastery lives and where the framework's propagation (novel synthesis) shows in play. Authored by Aevi (PO), from Erik's function-first + cross-domain direction.
principle: A skill answers a NEED-IN-THE-MOMENT: something must be healed, defended, struck, revealed, hidden, held, moved, ended. The function is universal — every world needs to heal a wound and stop a blow. The METHOD is the domain's: you heal by Vivimancy's quickening or Greenlore's brews or Numenwork's attention; you shield by Radiance's light-wall or Latticework's bound-structure or Soma's trained body or Stillcraft's held-peace. And the summit is COMBINATION: a wielder who holds two domains can braid their functions into effects the single-domain master cannot reach. The map of skills is not a list — it is a lattice of functions × domains × combinations.

functions.need: restore a hurt body, mind, or thing

byDomain.life (Vivimancy): quicken the wound closed — fast, forceful, can overgrow
byDomain.death (Palework): cannot heal — but can EASE, can stop a spreading rot by giving it a clean edge
byDomain.life-folk (Greenlore): brews and poultices — slow, safe, portable
byDomain.spirit (Numenwork): attend the wound as meaning — heal what was always metaphor; steady a breaking mind
byDomain.body (Soma): control the body's own healing — slow bleeding, push past shock

byDomain.light (Radiance): a wall of revealing light — nothing hidden gets through
byDomain.order (Latticework): a bound structure — a rule made solid, harm forbidden by law
byDomain.peace (Stillcraft): hold the moment from tipping — defend by preventing the blow's cause
byDomain.body (Soma): the trained body as its own armor — take it and keep the form
byDomain.dark (Umbracraft): not be where the blow lands — defense by concealment

byDomain.violence (the Edge): disciplined decisive force — the clean strike
byDomain.sound (Harmonic): shatter by resonance — drive a thing to failure
byDomain.chaos (Wildcraft): unmake their footing — win by their plan coming apart
byDomain.mind (Noesis): out-move them so completely the strike is already landed

byDomain.light (Radiance): strip concealment by force of light
byDomain.rune (rune-casting): read the pole-disposition by the throw
byDomain.mind (Noesis): model it so completely the hidden is deduced

byDomain.dark (Umbracraft): the Harbor — hide so well a knowing searcher fails
byDomain.peace/falsehood (Stillhold way): keep it by ensuring no one speaks it
byDomain.chaos (Wildcraft): hide in the noise — be unpredictable enough to lose

functions.need: make a thing stay — a truce, a structure, a creature, a possibility

byDomain.order (Latticework): bind by structure — a rule that holds
byDomain.peace (Stillcraft): bind two enemies to a truce
byDomain.life (Vivimancy): root a thing in place with living growth
byDomain.sound (Harmonic sustain): hold a structure by a sustained chord

byDomain.body (Soma): endurance and poise past the possible
byDomain.dark (Umbracraft): the ghost road — through the watched place unseen

functions.need: end a structure, a plan, a thing

byDomain.death (Palework): give it the clean end it's been refusing

functions.need: leave an effect that lasts — the inscription channel

byDomain.any + Inscription: will made structure the substrate keeps running — a ward that stands for days, a healing sigil worn, a trap that waits. Cross-cuts ALL domains: any function can be INSCRIBED to persist (see will_expression_modality).

crossDomainCombination.principle: The real depth. A wielder of two domains can BRAID their functions into an effect neither reaches alone. Combination is synthesis — the framework's propagation shown in the skill-lattice: a new true thing made from two. Mastery is not deeper single-domain rank; it is the reach ACROSS. The engine already has emergence-recipes (SNG-010 branch-templates); cross-domain combination is that, promoted to the heart of the skill system.
crossDomainCombination.howItResolves: Two owned abilities from different domains, used together in a beat, can produce a COMBINED effect the GM narrates and the engine treats as its own thing — higher effect, or a function the parts don't have. Gated by holding both (which the class-cost + capacity system already prices — cross-domain breadth costs, and this is its payoff). Attribute gates + intensity still apply. A botched combination fails worse than either part (synthesis is riskier).

examples.yields: The Warding Peace — a shield that doesn't block harm but forbids the CAUSE of it; a light-bound truce-field where violence literally cannot be raised. Neither light nor peace alone does this.
The Unseen Cut — a decisive strike from a direction that was never there; the disciplined kill delivered through the dark. Violence carried on shadow.

The Mercy-Knowing — the rare wielder of both life and death can tell, truly, whether a body should be pulled back or let go, and do either RIGHTLY. The Quiet-in-the-Quickwood made a skill. The most sacred and most terrible combination.
The Meaning-Engine — a machine that runs on significance, a Precursor work commanded by WHY not just HOW; the only way to truly treat with What Sleeps Under, which is both mechanism and meaning.
The Riding Order — unmake a structure and re-bind its pieces mid-collapse into what you need; chaos and order in one motion, the Living-Lattice jewel made a technique.
The Whole Act — body and mind as one instrument; the Middle Way's ideal made a skill, where thought and motion stop being separate and the athlete-scholar acts faster than either could decide.
The Sounding — ring a place and read what rings back; map a location's whole pole-disposition and its hidden co-firings at once. Read + reveal braided.

crossDomainCombination.framework_tie: Cross-domain combination IS propagation at the skill level — novel synthesis, the making of a third true thing from two. Single-domain mastery going pure toward a pole is the skill-level FORECLOSURE (powerful, narrow, drifting). The combiner holds the aperture open BETWEEN domains. The whole game's tension, in the character's own hands: go pure and deep toward one pole's foreclosure, or braid across and hold the open. Both are real paths; the world needs both; the framework's question is which you become.

buildImplication: Skills gain a `function` tag (heal/shield/strike/reveal/conceal/bind/move/break/ward) so the engine + GM can reason by need ('the player needs to shield — what in their kit does that, and how?'). Cross-domain combination extends the existing emergence-recipe engine: authored combination-recipes (function+domain × function+domain → combined effect) PLUS generative combination (SNG-020 can author a new braid in-grain when a player pairs two domains creatively). Ties: class-cost/capacity (breadth priced, combination is its payoff), attribute gates, intensity, inscription (any function can persist). Content: tag existing abilities with functions (Aevi), author a starter combination-recipe set (done here as examples — expand). Flagged to spec backlog as extension of SNG-010 emergence + SNG-020 generation.
